item.title: Has Housing & Urban Development Corporation Ltd. declared dividend?
item.description: Housing & Urban Development Corporation Ltd. has declared a 12% dividend, with an ex-date of March 27, 2026. While recent short-term returns have been negative, long-term returns over 3, 4, and 5 years show significant growth. Time: Mar 25 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of R&B Denims?
item.description: R&B Denims recently issued a 1:2 bonus, with an ex-date of April 2, 2026, and a record date of April 3, 2026, meaning shareholders will receive one additional share for every two shares held. Time: Mar 25 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of IRB Infra.Devl.?
item.description: IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd recently issued a 1:1 bonus, with an ex-date of March 30, 2026, and a record date of April 1, 2026. Shareholders on record by the record date will receive one additional share for each share owned. Time: Mar 25 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Mayur Uniquoters Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Mayur Uniquoters Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 25 Mar 2026. Yet, the broader technical and fundamental landscape presents a nuanced picture that calls for a deeper examination of this signal’s reliability. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:20 PM IST

item.title: 156% Stock Return vs 78% Profit Growth: What Drives Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd’s Multibagger Rally?
item.description: A 156.46% stock return in one year. A 78.58% growth in net profit over the same period. The gap between those two numbers — roughly 78 percentage points — is driven by the market's willingness to pay a significantly higher multiple for each rupee of Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd's earnings. That willingness is the story behind this multibagger performance. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:15 PM IST

item.title: Krystal Integrated Services Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Krystal Integrated Services Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Diversified Commercial Services sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, signalling deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Baazar Style Retail Ltd — Mixed Technical Signals Cloud the Outlook
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Baazar Style Retail Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 25 Mar 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture is conflicted, with weekly and monthly indicators sending mixed messages, raising questions about the signal’s reliability in this small-cap garment sector stock. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Nitiraj Engineers Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Fundamental Headwinds
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day for Nitiraj Engineers Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 25 Mar 2026. Yet, the stock declined 1.32% on the day, while monthly momentum indicators remain bearish. This divergence between the moving averages and other technical signals calls for a detailed examination of the signal's reliability. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Minda Corporation Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Minda Corporation Ltd, a key player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, signalling a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum despite its strong historical performance. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Birlasoft Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Birlasoft Ltd, a small-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s near- to medium-term outlook. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Makers Laboratories Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Makers Laboratories Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, signalling a golden cross on 25 Mar 2026. Yet, this technical milestone arrives amid a complex backdrop of conflicting momentum indicators and a micro-cap status that tempers the signal’s reliability. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Vaswani Industries Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Vaswani Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the ferrous metals sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200 DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This technical development, coupled with deteriorating momentum indicators and a downgrade in its Mojo Grade to Strong Sell, raises concerns about the stock’s near- to medium-term outlook despite its impressive long-term performance. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: CIAN Agro Industries & Infrastructure Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: CIAN Agro Industries & Infrastructure Ltd, a small-cap player in the edible oil sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's near- to medium-term outlook. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Chandra Prabhu International Ltd — On a Day the Stock Fell 0.85%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Chandra Prabhu International Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 25 Mar 2026. Yet, the stock declined 0.85% on the day the cross formed, while monthly technical indicators remain only mildly bullish or even bearish in some cases. This divergence between the moving averages and price action calls for a closer examination of the signal’s reliability. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Salona Cotspin Ltd. — On a Day the Stock Was Flat. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Salona Cotspin Ltd., signalling a golden cross on 25 Mar 2026. Yet, the stock closed unchanged on the day, while monthly technical indicators remain bearish. This juxtaposition of signals calls for a detailed examination of the broader technical and fundamental context. Time: Mar 25 2026 06:00 PM IST
